---
title: "Jake Hafen's Website"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## [ABOUT ME & RESEARCH](./about_me/About_Me.html) | [CV](./about_me/HafenJ_resume_2025.pdf) | [BIOL 3100 - Final Project](./final_project/Final_Project.html)##

# Jake Hafen: 
### Current Biotechnology and Microbiology Student at UVU
Currently based in Provo, UT. I'm a passionate scientist-in-training and avid outdoors enthusiast.

```{r, out.width="20%", echo = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics('headshot_2025.jpg')

```

Welcome to my website! Feel free to explore my research, resume, and my final project for BIOL 3100 (Data Analysis for Biologists). 

Any questions? Email jake.hfn@gmail.com for further inquiries.
